positive: A whimsical and intricate celestial map featuring a stylized mountain silhouette bathed in dawn light. The sky is a gradient of deep indigo, soft lavender, and warm apricot, detailed with glowing constellations (like the Big Dipper) formed by glowing white lines. Incorporate subtle botanical elements like stylized crescent moons and glowing, geometric flowers growing near the peaks. The overall style should be neo-whimsical, highly detailed line art mixed with watercolor gradients, suitable for a central, high-contrast apparel print. Minimalist yet maximalist in detail. Central composition, 3:4 vertical ratio for optimal print placement, clean silhouette of the mountain group, golden ratio composition, highly saturated colors.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, distorted, noise, grain, low detail, writing, messy, jpeg artifacts
